name: godot-devtool
description: Codex skills, an IDE-style Agent, and MCP workflow guidance for Godot Engine development.

interface.shortDescription: IDE-style Godot development Agent backed by MCP tools and focused skills.
interface.longDescription: Use godot-devtool to install and verify the Godot addon, author scenes and resources, perform live editor operations, run runtime tests, inspect Dock status, and verify releases through a structured MCP workflow.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the godot-dev Agent with the godot-devtool skill router. Start with get_godot_version and get_capabilities, then choose the matching workflow skill before editing, running, or releasing a Godot project.
